Constructors

Win32Window(in WindowDesc) 

public Win32Window(in WindowDesc desc)

Parameters

desc WindowDesc

Properties

ClientOriginPx

Screen position of client (0,0) in physical px (ClientToScreen) — the DIP→screen bridge for popup-window placement and per-monitor work-area queries.

public Point2 ClientOriginPx { get; }

Property Value

Point2

ClientSizePx 

public Size2 ClientSizePx { get; }

Property Value

Size2

Handle 

public NativeHandle Handle { get; }

Property Value

NativeHandle

IsActive

True while the window has activation (drives titlebar dimming). Change is signaled via the existing WindowFocus/WindowBlur events; this property is the pull side.

public bool IsActive { get; }

Property Value

bool

IsClosed 

public bool IsClosed { get; }

Property Value

bool

PaintRequested

Invoked by the platform when the OS demands an immediate repaint outside the app's frame loop — notably during the modal move/size loop (WM_SIZE/WM_PAINT), which otherwise blocks rendering until mouse-up. The host wires this to a pump-free paint so the window stays live during a live resize.

public Action? PaintRequested { get; set; }

Property Value

Action

Scale 

public float Scale { get; }

Property Value

float

State

Current placement (drives the custom max↔restore glyph). Change is signaled via WindowStateChanged; this property is the pull side.

public WindowState State { get; }

Property Value

WindowState

TextInput

The per-window IME/text-services seam (composition events, candidate-window placement).

public IPlatformTextInput TextInput { get; }

Property Value

IPlatformTextInput

Methods

CloseWindow() 

public void CloseWindow()

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

public void Dispose()

Minimize()

Engine caption-button commands (Win32: WM_SYSCOMMAND SC_MINIMIZE / SC_MAXIMIZE↔SC_RESTORE / WM_CLOSE).

public void Minimize()

PumpInto(InputEventRing)

Drain queued OS input/window events into the ring (once per frame).

public int PumpInto(InputEventRing ring)

Parameters

ring InputEventRing

Returns

int

SetClientSize(int, int)

Resize the window so the client area is exactly w×h px (drives a real WM_SIZE → resize path). For tests.

public void SetClientSize(int w, int h)

Parameters

w int
h int

SetCursor(CursorId)

Set the client-area cursor (applied immediately and re-asserted on every WM_SETCURSOR over the client).

public void SetCursor(CursorId id)

Parameters

id CursorId

SetTitle(StringId) 

public void SetTitle(StringId title)

Parameters

title StringId

SetTitleBarRegions(ReadOnlySpan<TitleBarRegion>)

Store the engine-reported NC regions (CLIENT DIP — converted to physical px at hit-test time so DPI hops need no re-report beyond the engine's own relayout push). Reused buffer; copy is per-relayout, not per-frame.

public void SetTitleBarRegions(ReadOnlySpan<TitleBarRegion> regions)

Parameters

regions ReadOnlySpan<TitleBarRegion>

Show() 

public void Show()

ToggleMaximize() 

public void ToggleMaximize()

WaitForWork(int)

Block until platform work arrives or timeoutMs elapses. Negative timeout means wait indefinitely. Real windows use this for event-driven idle; headless implementations may return immediately.

public void WaitForWork(int timeoutMs)

Parameters

timeoutMs int
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
